name: Tailscale Newly Created Privileged Accounts
description: Detects privileged Tailscale accounts created in the last 7 days for expedited review.
query: SELECT u.id AS id, u.display_name AS account_name, u.created AS created_at FROM tailscale_users u WHERE LOWER(COALESCE(u.status, '')) IN ('active','enabled','provisioned','onboarded') AND (LOWER(COALESCE(u.role, '')) LIKE '%admin%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(u.role, '')) LIKE '%owner%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(u.role, '')) LIKE '%super%') AND u.created > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
remediation: Confirm change tickets and owner approval for newly created privileged accounts.
